program.name: DevKofi AI-Powered MERN Stack Mentorship
program.subtitle: Choose the level of engineering support you need to plan, build, debug, test, and ship production-grade MERN applications with practical AI workflows.
program.promise: Learn how real engineers use AI as a multiplier while keeping architecture, code quality, and shipping discipline high.

guarantee.title: 14-day fit guarantee
guarantee.details: If the program is not the right fit within your first 14 days, you can request a refund.

plans.title: Standard
plans.tagline: Structured guidance for developers building real MERN projects with AI-assisted workflows.
plans.summary: Best for developers who want weekly guidance, practical accountability, and a clear path to shipping production-ready MERN projects with AI integrated into the workflow.
whoItsFor: Builders who need structure, direction, and accountability
outcomes: Plan features and scope work with AI support
Ship full-stack MERN features with strong debugging habits
Write cleaner docs, tests, and deployment checklists
includes: AI workflow training from planning to shipping
Project-based roadmap with real production constraints
Code review support for key milestones
plans.recommendedFor: Developers who want structure, accountability, and practical AI-powered MERN execution

plans.title: Pro
plans.tagline: High-accountability engineering support for builders shipping serious apps with stronger review habits.
plans.summary: Best for builders who want deeper technical review, faster feedback loops, architecture support, and closer guidance while shipping a serious product or advanced portfolio project.
whoItsFor: Engineers shipping serious portfolio or startup work
Developers preparing for technical interviews or product launches
Builders who want stronger external accountability
outcomes: Build review-ready repositories and architecture decisions
Develop confidence in AI-assisted engineering judgment
includes: Deeper code reviews and refactor feedback
Priority feedback and tighter accountability cadence
Direct support for production-level implementation decisions

availability.note: Limited seats with manual review and activation.

plans.recommendedFor: Developers and founders who want deeper review, faster feedback, and production-level support

plans.title: Team / Enterprise
plans.tagline: Practical AI-assisted engineering workflow training for teams.
plans.summary: Best for teams that want practical AI-assisted engineering workflows, shared development standards, and implementation support across real projects.
whoItsFor: Teams needing stronger planning, review, and delivery systems
outcomes: Higher code quality and review standards
includes: Team workflow coaching and engineering standards
Practical AI-assisted planning and delivery sessions
Code review systems and delivery process improvements
Custom training for Claude Code, Codex, and agentic workflows
plans.recommendedFor: Teams that want practical AI-assisted engineering systems and stronger delivery discipline
